notes: Pure-Python Atheris harnesses. Mayhem targets are thin ELF launchers (mayhem/launcher.c) that exec python3 on the harness, because Mayhem requires an ELF target. Two targets: fuzz-cal (the original mayhemheroes harness mayhem/fuzz_cal.py) and ical-fuzzer (the upstream OSS-Fuzz harness src/icalendar/fuzzing/ical_fuzzer.py, shipped unmodified for OSS-Fuzz parity). The behavioral oracle (mayhem/icalendar_oracle) is likewise an ELF launcher so the anti-reward-hack sabotage check can neuter it.
